description: Economics and Business capability progression map — Skills strand, Year 7 to 10. Four sub-strands following ACARA headings.
subject: Economics and Business

standards.title: Develop inquiry questions
standards.description: develop questions to investigate a contemporary economic and business issue
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions to investigate a contemporary economic and business issue.

standards.title: Locate and organise information
standards.description: locate, select and organise information and data from a range of sources
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, select and organise information and data from a range of sources.

standards.title: Interpret economic data
standards.description: interpret information and data to identify economic and business issues, trends and economic cause-and-effect relationships
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and data to identify economic and business issues, trends and cause-and-effect relationships.

standards.title: Develop responses to issues
standards.description: develop a response to an economic and business issue, identifying potential costs and benefits
standards.capability_goal: Students develop a response to an economic and business issue, identifying potential costs and benefits.

standards.title: Create economic explanations
standards.description: create descriptions and explanations, using economic and business knowledge, concepts and terms, and referencing information and data from sources
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions and explanations using economic and business knowledge, concepts and terms.

standards.title: Develop inquiry questions
standards.description: develop questions to investigate a contemporary economic and business issue
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions to investigate a contemporary economic and business issue.

standards.capability_goal: Students locate, select and organise information and data from a range of sources.

standards.title: Interpret economic data
standards.description: interpret information and data to identify economic and business issues, trends and economic cause-and-effect relationships
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and data to identify economic and business issues, trends and cause-and-effect relationships.

standards.title: Develop responses to issues
standards.description: develop a response to an economic and business issue, identifying potential costs and benefits
standards.capability_goal: Students develop a response to an economic and business issue, identifying potential costs and benefits.

standards.title: Create economic explanations
standards.description: create descriptions and explanations, using economic and business knowledge, concepts and terms, and referencing information and data from sources
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions and explanations using economic and business knowledge, concepts and terms.

standards.title: Develop and modify inquiry questions
standards.description: develop and modify questions to investigate a contemporary economic and business issue
standards.capability_goal: Students develop and modify questions to investigate a contemporary economic and business issue.

standards.title: Locate, select and analyse information
standards.description: locate, select and analyse information and data from a range of sources
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, select and analyse information and data from a range of sources.

standards.title: Interpret and predict economic impacts
standards.description: interpret information and data, explaining economic and business issues, trends and economic cause-and-effect relationships, and make predictions about consumer and financial impacts
standards.capability_goal: Students interpret information and data, explain economic trends and make predictions about consumer and financial impacts.

standards.title: Evaluate and decide using cost-benefit
standards.description: develop and evaluate a response to an economic and business issue, using cost-benefit analysis or criteria to decide on a course of action
standards.capability_goal: Students develop and evaluate a response to an economic and business issue using cost-benefit analysis or criteria.

standards.title: Create referenced economic arguments
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and arguments, using economic and business knowledge, concepts and terms that incorporate and acknowledge research findings
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and arguments using economic and business knowledge that incorporate and acknowledge research findings.
